dataset_evaluation.head_to_head_summary: HierMem wins because it preserves constraint adherence across the early and middle checkpoints and only slips when asked for raw SQL, while Raw_LLM also stays compliant but violates the no-raw-JOIN rule at the raw SQL checkpoint. RAG and RAG_Summary exhibit larger compliance drops at Turn 49 by emitting raw SQL JOINs without parameter binding, indicating sharper context-policy degradation under pressure; their earlier turns are mostly compliant but include occasional ORM API inaccuracies.
